de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class TacletApplPart

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.TacletApplPart

  • public class TacletApplPart
extends Object

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private Sequent ifseq 
      private ImmutableList<VariableCondition> variableConditions 
      private ImmutableList<NewVarcond> varsNew 
      private ImmutableList<NewDependingOn> varsNewDependingOn 
      private ImmutableList<NotFreeIn> varsNotFreeIn 

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      TacletApplPart(Sequent ifseq, ImmutableList<NewVarcond> varsNew, ImmutableList<NotFreeIn> varsNotFreeIn, ImmutableList<NewDependingOn> varsNewDependingOn, ImmutableList<VariableCondition> variableConditions)
      constructs a new TacletApplPart object with the given Sequent, a list of variables that are new, a list of variable pairs that represent the NotFreeIn relation and a list of additional generic variable conditions.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ImmutableList<VariableCondition> getVariableConditions()
      returns the list of additional generic conditions on instantiations of schema variables.
      Sequent ifSequent()
      returns the if-sequent of the application part of a Taclet
      ImmutableList<NewVarcond> varsNew()
      returns the list of variables that are new in a Taclet
      ImmutableList<NewDependingOn> varsNewDependingOn()
      returns the list of variable pairs that represent the "new depending on" relation of a Taclet
      ImmutableList<NotFreeIn> varsNotFreeIn()
      returns the list of variable pairs that represent the NotFreeIn relation of a Taclet

      • TacletApplPart

        public TacletApplPart(Sequent ifseq,
              ImmutableList<NewVarcond> varsNew,
              ImmutableList<NotFreeIn> varsNotFreeIn,
              ImmutableList<NewDependingOn> varsNewDependingOn,
              ImmutableList<VariableCondition> variableConditions)
        constructs a new TacletApplPart object with the given Sequent, a list of variables that are new, a list of variable pairs that represent the NotFreeIn relation and a list of additional generic variable conditions.

    • Method Detail

      • ifSequent

        public Sequent ifSequent()
        returns the if-sequent of the application part of a Taclet

      • varsNew

        public ImmutableList<NewVarcond> varsNew()
        returns the list of variables that are new in a Taclet

      • varsNotFreeIn

        public ImmutableList<NotFreeIn> varsNotFreeIn()
        returns the list of variable pairs that represent the NotFreeIn relation of a Taclet

      • varsNewDependingOn

        public ImmutableList<NewDependingOn> varsNewDependingOn()
        returns the list of variable pairs that represent the "new depending on" relation of a Taclet

      • getVariableConditions

        public ImmutableList<VariableCondition> getVariableConditions()
        returns the list of additional generic conditions on instantiations of schema variables. The list ist readonly.
